LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ONEWEST BANK, FSB, AS THE SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO MERS AND DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE OF THE INDYMAC INDX MORTGAGE LOAN TRUST 2004-AR14 MORTGAGE PASS-THROUGH CERTIFICATES, SERIES 2004-AR14, UNDER THE POOLING AND SERVICING AGREEMENT DATED DECEMBER 1, 2004, DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF AND REQUEST TO DISSOLVE INJUNCTION. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. AS TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION (DECLARATORY RELIEF) CC SECTION 1632 (TRANSLATION REQUIREMENT) DOES NOT APPLY TO HOME LOAN MORTGAGES. NO EXCEPTIONS TO THIS RULE ARE ALLEGED. AS TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (B&P CODE SECTION 17200) PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE THE WRONGFUL CONDUCT OF THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS, NOT MERELY REFER TO THE DEFENDANTS COLLECTIVELY. AS TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION (FRAUD) PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD WITH SPECIFICITY (WHAT WAS SAID OR NOT SAID, BY WHOM, WHEN, AND IN WHAT CONTEXT.) PLAINTIFF MUST DIFFERENTIATE AMONGST THE DEFENDANTS. AS TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION (INTENTIONAL MISREPRESENTATION) PLAINTIFF MUST SPECIFY THE STATEMENTS, WHEN, AND BY WHICH DEFENDANTS. AS TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION (INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS) PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT AS TO THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS. COURT ORDERS PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER THAT CONFORMS TO COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MTC FINANCIAL INC., DBA TRUSTEE CORPS DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - SUSTAINED WITH ONE, FINAL, 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 2ND, 3RD AND 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD WITH PARTICULARITY AS TO TRUSTEE CORPS. (THE DECLARATION ATTACHED TO THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT CLEARLY STATES IT WAS MADE UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY.) PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE ACTIONABLE CONDUCT BY TRUSTEE AND A STATUTORY OR FRAUDULENT BASIS TO SUPPORT A VIOLATION OF B&P CODE SECTION 17200. PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE ACTIONABLE FRAUD COMMITTED BY TRUSTEE TO SUPPORT THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CC SECTION 1572. AS TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD A SPECIFIC MATERIAL MISREPRESENTATION AS TO TRUSTEE DEFENDANT'S KNOWLEDGE OF FALSITY, INTENT TO DEFRAUD, RELIANCE AND DAMAGE. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER, TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: ARLENE HOWELL, CSR #2542

Off Calendar Jul-30-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT ONEWEST BANK, FSB, AS THE SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO MERS AND DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE OF THE INDYMAC INDX MORTGAGE LOAN TRUST 2004-AR14 MORTGAGE PASS-THROUGH CERTIFICATES, SERIES 2004-AR14, UNDER THE POOLING AND SERVICING AGREEMENT DATED DECEMBER 1, 2004, DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF AND REQUEST TO DISSOLVE INJUNCTION.

APPEARANCES: Justin Park, Esq. of Law Offices of Gene W. Choe, P.C. 213/639-3888 for pltf & opposing party (appearing via CourtCall); no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. AS TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION (DECLARATORY RELIEF) CC SECTION 1632 (TRANSLATION REQUIREMENT) DOES NOT APPLY TO HOME LOAN MORTGAGES. NO EXCEPTIONS TO THIS RULE ARE ALLEGED. AS TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (B&P CODE SECTION 17200) PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE THE WRONGFUL CONDUCT OF THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS, NOT MERELY REFER TO THE DEFENDANTS COLLECTIVELY. AS TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION (FRAUD) PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD WITH SPECIFICITY (WHAT WAS SAID OR NOT SAID, BY WHOM, WHEN, AND IN WHAT CONTEXT.) PLAINTIFF MUST DIFFERENTIATE AMONGST THE DEFENDANTS. AS TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION (INTENTIONAL MISREPRESENTATION) PLAINTIFF MUST SPECIFY THE STATEMENTS, WHEN, AND BY WHICH DEFENDANTS. AS TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION (INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS) PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT AS TO THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS. Court orders PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER THAT CONFORMS TO COURT'S RULING. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
